nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Keel-billed motmot
nodes.summary: Keel-billed motmot（Keel-billed motmot，学名 Electron carinatum），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于常綠森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | page =322 }} The keel-billed motmot inhabits humid evergreen forest, and favors steep-sided gullies with streams

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In most areas it is threatened by continuing habitat loss due to logging, conversion to banana plantations, other agriculture, and ranching, and to human settlement

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In most areas it is threatened by continuing habitat loss due to logging, conversion to banana plantations, other agriculture, and ranching, and to human settlement
